cseTOP.Name: CSE run
cseTOP.runTitle: MF8 Individual Supply + Individual Exhaust (SZHP-HRV) / Proposed / EX02_MF08_Res_VRF_TYPE 2_HP_CZ09.cibd25x

cseGAIN.Name: Zone1-znRfrg
cseGAIN.gnPower_x: (5.58356 * 3412 / 24) * ( select( $isWeHol, RefrConst_WEH, default RefrConst_WD ) + select( $isWeHol, RefrTemp_WEH, default RefrTemp_WD ) * @znRes["Zone1-zn"].prior.H.tAir)

cseGAIN.Name: Zone2-znRfrg
cseGAIN.gnPower_x: (5.58356 * 3412 / 24) * ( select( $isWeHol, RefrConst_WEH, default RefrConst_WD ) + select( $isWeHol, RefrTemp_WEH, default RefrTemp_WD ) * @znRes["Zone2-zn"].prior.H.tAir)
